name: Wilson Family Sauce for English Plum Pudding
recipeInstructions: Combine brown sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan. Add the water and butter. Stir over medium heat until the mixture boils, then cook until the mixture clarifies and thickens slightly, about 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the flavoring, lemon juice, and marshmallows. Serve hot over plum pudding.
